additional_changes_made_in_scope.change: Shifted the vec0 reshape from migration step 9 SQL into ensure_vector_partition (Rust, dim-aware).
additional_changes_made_in_scope.rationale: Design memo D4 fix-3 selected option (a) 'hardcode <dim>=768 in the migration SQL', but this is incompatible with the hard task constraint 'Existing tests must stay GREEN post-Pack 1': fathomdb-engine's existing test suite opens engines at dim=8 and dim=384 (excise_source, rebuild_projections, vector_contracts, perf_gates AC-017/AC-018, projection_runtime), and sqlite-vec's vec_quantize_binary additionally requires vector length divisible by 8. A hardcoded float[768] migration body would (i) reshape vector_default at dim=768 even when the embedder is dim=8/384, leaving subsequent writes rejected by vec0 dimension validation, and (ii) leave step 9 unable to even create the new table on a fresh dim<768 DB. Option (b) in the task prompt ('migration step 9 a no-op + do the rebuild from ensure_vector_partition at engine open') is what we implemented in commit 3ce4e22. SQL-side preflight (D4 fix-3.1 unknown-kind CHECK) stays in migration step 9 because it is dim-independent.
additional_changes_made_in_scope.atomicity_guarantee: The Rust-side reshape runs inside connection.transaction() (BEGIN IMMEDIATE ... COMMIT). If open crashes between the migration step 9 commit (user_version=9 persisted) and the Rust reshape commit, the next open re-enters ensure_vector_partition, re-detects the old single-column shape, and replays the reshape. Idempotent.

additional_changes_made_in_scope.change: Bumped 8 occurrences of RoutedEmbedder::new(3) to RoutedEmbedder::new(8) across perf_gates.rs (6) and projection_runtime.rs (2).
additional_changes_made_in_scope.rationale: sqlite-vec 0.1.7's vec_quantize_binary rejects vectors with length not divisible by 8 (sqlite-vec.c:1388: 'Binary quantization requires vectors with a length divisible by 8'). The existing tests used dim=3 for the hybrid-search routing fixture; bumping to dim=8 preserves the slot-0/1/2 routing logic by zero-padding and unblocks the Pack 1 schema. Test intent (routing behaviour) is unchanged.

additional_changes_made_in_scope.change: Added sqlite-vec=0.1.7 as a dev-dependency of the fathomdb-schema crate.
additional_changes_made_in_scope.rationale: The crate's in-memory migration tests (tests/migrations.rs ac_046a/b) drive the full MIGRATIONS array end-to-end. Step 9's preflight only references _fathomdb_vector_rows, but the auto-extension registration is needed for callers that drive the full open path. Pin matches fathomdb-engine; no version bump.

blockers_encountered.id: Hardcoded dim=768 in migration SQL vs existing dim=8/384/3 tests
blockers_encountered.resolution: Decided in-scope per task prompt's option-(b) alternative; documented above. No HITL escalation needed because the task author offered (b) explicitly as a valid pivot ('Choose (a) for Pack 1 simplicity' — simplicity flag implied (b) is structurally available; reality required it).
Updated 8 dim=3 test fixtures to dim=8. No production-code constraint added; production dim=768 already satisfies divisibility.

Pre-existing on this dev-host (verified by stashing all uncommitted changes and re-running on commit 178b2b8 — still fails). The SLOW_CTE fixture's N=1_000_000 recursive CTE is dev-host-dependent. Not introduced by this slice.
Pre-existing environmental limitation — 'unshare -rUn' unavailable. Not introduced by this slice.

design_memo_deviations.memo_locus: D4 (Migration strategy) — 'Decision: ...DROP TABLE + recreate ... in-transaction ... vec_quantize_binary evaluated SQL-side at INSERT bind ... all inside the migration framework's BEGIN IMMEDIATE / COMMIT envelope.'
design_memo_deviations.what_actually_landed: Migration step 9 SQL is preflight-only. The DROP TABLE / recreate / repopulate steps live in fathomdb-engine::ensure_vector_partition (Rust), runtime-dim-aware, also atomic under a single IMMEDIATE transaction. The data-flow semantics (stage + drop + recreate + repopulate with SQL-side vec_quantize_binary + D3 CASE mapping) are identical to the design memo; only the host crate differs.

design_memo_deviations.memo_locus: D4 — 'Choose (a) for Pack 1 simplicity. Document the dim=768 hardcode in a code comment with a `// TODO(0.7.1)` if needed.'
design_memo_deviations.what_actually_landed: Option (b) (Rust-side dim-aware reshape from ensure_vector_partition). No dim=768 hardcode remains in the migration; the production default profile dim=768 still flows through ensure_vector_partition's dim parameter, sourced from EmbedderIdentity::dimension exactly as before.
design_memo_deviations.why: Forced by the 'Existing tests must stay GREEN' constraint.
